---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Which phase does this relate to?**
[e.g., Phase 2 — Interrupts, Phase 4 — Scheduler, or new]

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or limitation you're running into.

**Proposed solution**
How you think it should work.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've thought of.

**Additional context**
Any examples, references, or relevant specs.
